title: tf.constant  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Creates a constant tensor from a tensor-like object.
If the argumentdtypeis not specified, then the type is inferred from
the type ofvalue.
Ifdtypeis specified, the resulting tensor values are cast to the requesteddtype.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description:
All eagertf.Tensors are immutable (in contrast totf.Variable). There is nothing especiallyconstantabout the value
returned fromtf.constant. This function is not fundamentally different fromtf.convert_
